known_title_or_target: Effects of procedural and distributive justice on reactions to a selection system.
paperclip_objective: Find an independently accessible full article, accepted manuscript, preprint, abstract/details page, or repository copy for this represented paper.
paperclip_search_query: "Effects of procedural and distributive justice on reactions to a selection system." OR "10.1037//0021-9010.79.5.691"
paperclip_success_condition: At least a directly mirrored landing/abstract page for level 4; full PDF/HTML/manuscript for level 6-7; supplement/package for level 8.
paperclip_example_commands:
paperclip search '"Effects of procedural and distributive justice on reactions to a selection system." OR "10.1037//0021-9010.79.5.691"' -n 20

paperclip map --from <search_id> "Return DOI, title, source, whether full text/abstract is available, and any repository/preprint URL."
